question: What term did Lewis et al. 2020 introduce that combines a pre-trained retriever with a pre-trained seq2seq model?
According to Table 1 in the RAG survey, what specific latency characteristic is listed for RAG compared to fine-tuning?
What are the three core metrics focused on by evaluation frameworks like RAGAS and ARES for RAG, as listed in Section 7.2 of the RAG survey?
In the RAG survey Section 7.2, what four basic abilities does the RGB benchmark evaluate for RAG?
According to Section 2.1 of the RAG survey, what are the two key stages of the RAG system?
In Figure 2 of the RAG survey, at what levels of external knowledge required and model adaptation required is Modular RAG positioned?
According to Table 1 in the TCN paper, what accuracy does TCN achieve on Sequential MNIST, and what are the corresponding accuracies for LSTM and GRU?
In Table 1 of the TCN paper, what is the word-level PTB perplexity of TCN compared to LSTM?
According to Section 5.4 of the TCN paper, below what sequence length T does the LSTM fall below 20% accuracy on the copy memory task?
What two disadvantages of TCNs does Section 3.5 of the TCN paper explicitly list?
In Table 4 of the TCN paper (SoTA results), what is the SoTA model for the Copy Memory T=1000 task, what loss does it achieve, and what loss does the TCN achieve on the same task?
In the TCN paper, what is the dilated convolution operation F on element s formally defined as in Equation 2?
According to the abstract of the BLIP-2 paper, by how much does BLIP-2 outperform Flamingo80B on zero-shot VQAv2, and how many times fewer trainable parameters does it use?
In Table 1 of the BLIP-2 paper, what is the number of trainable parameters for BLIP-2 and what zero-shot VQAv2 accuracy does it achieve?
What are the three pre-training objectives jointly optimized in BLIP-2's first stage representation learning, as described in Section 3.2?
According to Section 3.1 of the BLIP-2 paper, how many queries are used in Q-Former and what is the dimension of each query?
According to Table 6 of the BLIP-2 paper, what is the image-to-text retrieval R@1 score on COCO with ITC+ITM alone versus ITC+ITM+ITG, and what does the difference demonstrate?
According to Section 3.4 of the BLIP-2 paper, what pre-training dataset is used and how many images does it contain in total?
In Table 2 of the DPR paper, what is the Top-20 retrieval accuracy of DPR (Single) versus BM25 on Natural Questions?
According to Table 3 of the DPR paper, what happens to Top-20 retrieval accuracy on Natural Questions as the number of gold in-batch negatives grows from 7 to 31 to 127?
According to Section 5.4 of the DPR paper, how many questions per second can DPR process at inference time, and how does this compare to BM25/Lucene?
In Table 4 of the DPR paper, what exact match score does DPR (Single) achieve on Natural Questions compared to ORQA?
In Table 4 of the MobileNetV2 paper, what are the Top-1 accuracy, number of parameters, MAdds, and CPU latency for MobileNetV2 (width multiplier 1.0) compared to MobileNetV1?
According to Table 5 in the MobileNetV2 paper, what are the parameter counts and MAdds for SSD and SSDLite when configured with MobileNetV2 for 80 classes?
In Table 3 of the MobileNetV2 paper, what is the maximum memory in Kb that needs to be materialized at the 14x14 spatial resolution for MobileNetV1 versus MobileNetV2?
According to Table 1 in the BERT re-ranking paper, what is the MRR@10 score of BERT Large on the MS MARCO dev set, and how does it compare to Conv-KNRM?
In Figure 1 of the BERT re-ranking paper, approximately how many training examples does BERT Large need to surpass the IR-NET previous SOTA, and what MRR@10 does it achieve at that point?
In the BERT re-ranking paper, what is the exact cross-entropy loss function used to fine-tune the re-ranker, and what do Jpos and Jneg represent?
According to the BERT re-ranking paper, what batch size, number of iterations, and approximate training duration were used to fine-tune on MS MARCO using a TPU v3-8?

In the BERT re-ranking paper, by what relative percentage does BERT Large outperform the previous state of the art in MRR@10 on MS MARCO, and what is the MAP score of BERT Large on the TREC-CAR test set?
According to Table 1 in the RAGAS paper, what is the faithfulness accuracy of Ragas versus GPT Score and GPT Ranking on the WikiEval dataset?
In the RAGAS paper, how is the Answer Relevance score AR formally computed, and what embedding model is used to calculate similarity between questions?
According to the RAGAS paper, what is the formula used to compute Context Relevance (CR), and what does the LLM return if no relevant sentences are found in the context?

In the RAGAS paper's WikiEval dataset examples (Tables 2, 3, 4), what are the high-faithfulness and low-faithfulness answers given for the Oppenheimer question, and who directed the film according to the high-faithfulness answer?

According to the RAGAS paper, how many Wikipedia pages were selected to construct WikiEval, what time period did they cover, and what inter-annotator agreement rates were reported for faithfulness and context relevance?
What is the formal RRF scoring formula given in the RRF paper, and what value of k was fixed after pilot investigation?
According to Table 2 in the RRF paper, what MAP score does RRF achieve on TREC Robust, and on which TREC collection does CombMNZ outperform RRF?

According to Table 3 in the RRF paper, what MAP score does RRF achieve on the LETOR 3 corpus, what is the margin by which it beats the best individual ranking, and which method comes closest to RRF with a statistically non-significant difference?
According to Table 1 in the RRF paper, what MAP value does RRF achieve at k=60, and what is the MAP of the best individual system shown for comparison on TREC topics 351-400?
In the RRF paper, how many times did RRF outperform Condorcet across the pilot and TREC experiments (excluding the first pilot run), and what was the reported p-value?
According to Table 1 in the ResNet paper, how many FLOPs does the 152-layer ResNet have, and how does this compare to VGG-16 and VGG-19 in terms of computational complexity?

In Figure 1 of the ResNet paper, what degradation phenomenon is demonstrated with the 20-layer and 56-layer plain networks on CIFAR-10, and how do both training error and test error compare between the two depths?
According to Table 2 in the ResNet paper, what are the top-1 errors (%, 10-crop testing) for the 18-layer and 34-layer plain networks versus their ResNet counterparts on ImageNet validation?
In Figure 2 of the ResNet paper, what is the formal definition of the residual building block output y, and what operation connects the shortcut path to the main path?
According to Table 5 in the ResNet paper, what top-5 test error does the ResNet ensemble achieve on ImageNet for ILSVRC 2015, and how does it compare to the previous best ensemble result from VGG?
According to the ROUGE paper, what is the full name that ROUGE stands for, and what four ROUGE measures are introduced in the paper?

In the ROUGE paper, using the example sentences S1 through S4 in Section 3.1, what are the ROUGE-L scores for S2 and S3 when S1 is used as the reference (with β=1), and why does this illustrate ROUGE-L's advantage over ROUGE-2?

According to Table 1 in the ROUGE paper, what Pearson's correlation does ROUGE-2 achieve on DUC 2001 100-word single document summarization with 1 reference under the CASE setting, and which measure achieves the highest correlation (0.85) with 3 references?
In the ROUGE paper, what is the ROUGE-S score formula (Equation 18), and using the example in Section 5 with S1 as reference, what are the ROUGE-S scores of S2, S3, and S4 with β=1?

According to Table 2 in the ROUGE paper, which ROUGE measures achieve the highest Pearson's correlation on the DUC 2003 10-word single document very short summary task under the STOP setting with 4 references?
